case_title: ARCHSTONE PROPERTIES,LLC VS. MICHAEL MURPHY et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARCHSTONE PROPERTIES,LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MURPHY, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1390 MARKET ST. #2902, S.F. CA. 94102, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MURPHY, MICHAEL
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCHSTONE PROPERTIES,LLC

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCHSTONE PROPERTIES,LLC SERVED FEB-02-2006, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT MURPHY, MICHAEL DOES 1 TO 10,INCLUSIVE
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS
DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT, PER CCP 585D FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCHSTONE PROPERTIES,LLC
DECLARATION RE DAILY RENTAL VALUE:$46.35 FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCHSTONE PROPERTIES,LLC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MURPHY, MICHAEL
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $495.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MURPHY, MICHAEL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARCHSTONE PROPERTIES,LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MURPHY, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFT. VACATED ON 3/8/06 $2,230.00 RENT, $495.00 COSTS, $3,059.10 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,784.10, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( PLACED IN PICK-UP BOX )
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCHSTONE PROPERTIES,LLC
